Portfolio.professionalSummary: Senior full-stack developer with solid experience in microservices architecture, technical leadership, and mentoring. Currently at FCamara focused on front end (Vite) and consulting for Raia Drogasil (RD) on dashboards fed by integration data and API contract alignment with the backend. Strong in Node.js (TypeScript/NestJS), .NET, and Ruby on Rails; background with uConnect (uMode) and technical leadership on Engage (BonifiQ). Degree in Physics (licentiate).
Portfolio.aboutNarrative: I work at FCamara as a senior full-stack developer, emphasizing Vite on the front end and consulting for Raia Drogasil (RD) — dashboards powered by integration data. I lean on backend experience to collaborate with the team, define API contracts, and keep delivery coherent. Previously BonifiQ (Engage, .NET/React) and uMode (uConnect, NestJS). Physics degree from UESB and full-stack web development from Trybe.

highlights: Front-end focused work on a Vite stack, with strong backend foundations to align with the team, support API changes, and formalize contracts across layers.
Consulting for Raia Drogasil (RD): building dashboards that surface integration data, prioritizing clarity, reliability, and fit with business flows.
Technical leadership for the Engage team, focused on innovation and high-impact greenfield work.
Architecture and maintenance of 7 React + TypeScript + Vite apps (widgets, checkouts, editors, landing pages) with a focus on performance and scalability.
End-to-end backend work in .NET, shipping full features and supporting front-end developers’ technical growth.
Conception and architecture of the uConnect microservice: dynamic integrations driven by database configuration, streamlining data flow across the platform.
Led migration from a Serverless setup to a robust NestJS architecture.
Managed the integrations area, ensuring data integrity across multiple systems.
Implemented features and backend integration in a React app, improving the UI and data-flow consistency.
CRM platform development: full-stack architecture with React on the front end and NestJS on the back end, focused on scalability and sales processes.
Built and finished React front-end modules, participating in the full delivery cycle.

FeaturedProjects.title: Integration dashboards — Raia Drogasil (RD)
FeaturedProjects.summary: Dashboards that consolidate and display data from integrations, focused on operational clarity and alignment with what the backend exposes.
highlights: Vite front end with close collaboration with the backend team.
Definition and refinement of contracts for safe data consumption.

Mentoring and technical growth for front-end developers.

FeaturedProjects.title: uConnect — integration engine
FeaturedProjects.summary: Microservice for dynamic integrations driven by database configuration, reducing friction in data flow between the platform and external systems.
highlights: Conception and architecture of the service from idea to production.
Migration from Serverless to a more sustainable NestJS architecture.
